title: What expats typically do next
intro: After your first 30–90 days, many expats arrange banking, insurance, and mobile. Here are services commonly used.

items.reason: Open a Dutch account for salary and direct debits.
Compare Dutch insurance once you have a BSN.
Simple mobile plan to get connected.
